title: agent_started.data.tools[] surfaces every agent-built-in tool with avp.tool.dispatch_target=local
description: With the refs-only Commission, agent_started.data.tools[] is the agent-internal contribution to the unified tool bag: built-in tools the agent ships compiled into its package. Each entry MUST include `name` and SHOULD set `avp.dispatch_target` to `local`. MCP-server tools land separately on `mcp_server_connected.data.avp.mcp.tools[]` after resolution.

agent_builtin_tools.name: read_file
agent_builtin_tools.description: Read a file from the workspace.

events.label: agent_started lists both built-ins with dispatch_target=local

avp.tools.name: read_file
avp.tools.description: Read a file from the workspace.
